title: Amazon QuickSight
description: Learn Amazon QuickSight for BI dashboards and analytics: datasets, SPICE, visuals, calculations, parameters, filters, RLS, refresh schedules, embedded analytics concepts, and publishing production dashboards.
prerequisites: SQL basics (SELECT, JOIN, GROUP BY). Basic understanding of data models is helpful.

courseStructure.title: QuickSight Overview & Setup
topics: What QuickSight is and BI use cases

courseStructure.title: SPICE & Performance
topics: What is SPICE and why it’s used
Performance best practices for fast dashboards

courseStructure.title: Visuals, Charts & Dashboard Building
topics: Choosing the right chart for each metric
Dashboard layout and storytelling best practices

courseStructure.title: Calculated Fields & Analytics Features
topics: Date functions and time series analysis basics
Top N, ranking, and contribution analysis (intro)

courseStructure.title: Parameters, Controls & Interactivity
topics: Designing interactive dashboards for end users

courseStructure.title: Security: Row-Level Security (RLS) & Sharing
topics: Sharing: users/groups access to analyses and dashboards
Row-Level Security dataset concept and setup
IAM/permission model overview for data sources

courseStructure.title: Publishing, Operations & Maintenance
topics: Publishing dashboards and version control concept

courseStructure.title: Mini Project — Production Dashboard
topics: Create datasets from Athena/Redshift sample schema
Build an executive KPI dashboard with filters and drill downs
Add calculated fields + parameters for interactivity
Enable RLS for role-based dashboard access
Schedule refresh and validate data correctness
Publish dashboard + document the build in GitHub README
